title: Greenleaf 2 pack of ORANGE & HONEY Large Scented Sachet Bag, Drawer Fragrance Wardrobe Air Room Freshener for Living Room Bedroom Bathroom Laundry Basket or Car - Fragrance Notes of Fruits & Vine
features: FRAGRANCE DESCRIPTION: Revitalizing through and through, Orange & Honey lands the senses amidst a picturesque orange grove where clusters of nature's candy gleam in ripened glory. The pleasant aroma that isn't too intruding. Our sachets use specially blended Essential Oils that are encapsulated for maximum strength and product life.

DIRECTIONS OF USE: Hold the sachet and take a sniff! If you like the scent, keep this one for yourself. If you want it to smell stronger, shake the sachet. This activates the fragrance inside the scent packet. Place your sachet in a wardrobe, under the seat in your car, under your sink, or anywhere else you'd like a touch of fragrance. For more examples of use please see the description below.
LONG LASTING SCENT: Sachets are over-wrapped to ensure the longevity of the fragrance, remove over-wrap before use. Store out of direct sunlight and away from high temperatures in your home.

GIFT IDEA: Add these scented sachets to any birthday or anniversary gift to make your loved ones surprised with a nice smell or add them during the reunions or parties to create a perfect environment! An excellent Mothers Day, Birthday, Christmas or Wedding Gift. A small present can go a long way.
SIZE: 17 x 11.5cm; 10 Grams. Eco Friendly. Special paper that diffuses fragrance for about 3 months. It's biodegradable, too! With strong packaging, the paper bag doesn't tear easily.
description: Product description HOW YOU USE: CAR: Scented sachets make great car air fresheners! Place the sachet under your seat in the car, tuck it between your sun visor and the roof of your car, or slip one of your sachets in the pocket on the back of your seat. If it’s summer, you’ll notice that the sachet gives off more fragrance when it’s left in the heat CLOSET: You can put your sachet inside shoes or shoe box to help eliminate foot odour. You can attach your sachet to a hanger in your wardrobes and use it to fragrance your clothes. You can store a sachet with your wrapping paper in your holiday closet to make your gifts smell festive! You can also place your sachet in the pocket of coats to keep them from getting musty while they are in storage BATHROOM: Hide the sachet behind the toilet to make the bathroom smell fresh WITH BED SHEETS OR TOWELS: You can slip a sachet in between sheets, linen, hand towels, and the like to perfume them and help them smell fresh and clean WITH SCHOOL SUPPLIES IN LUGGAGE WHEN TRAVELING DIAPER BINS: Baby Powder sachet recomendedEVERYWHERE ELSE: Use them for silk flower arrangements, in your kitchen, vacuum cleaner bags, diaper bins, in the liner of your trash cans - anywhere where you need a touch of fragrance, removing odour or purifying the air ARE SACHETS FOR DRAWERS? Not really a question, but just so you know, our sachets are the kind you want to place in your drawers with a piece of fabric or paper between the sachet and your furniture.DO NOT USE ON WOOD: The fragrance oil in the sachet can damage some surfaces if it’s placed directly on them. Read the back label of the sachet to find out which surfaces you should not directly place your sachet envelope onDO NOT GET THEM WET: Keep your sachet in a dry environmentDO NOT OPEN: Keep this puppy sealed tight so that all the fragrance remains inside. This allows the sachet to diffuse fragrance for its intended lifespan. Safety Warning DO NOT GET THEM WET, DO NOT OPEN
